title: Syrian Pilaf with Crispy Rice
description: A flavorful Middle Eastern-inspired pilaf made with tender Syrian rice and crispy rice at the bottom.

ingredients.name: Gently cooked chicken (optional)
ingredients.notes: cook with 1 tsp olive oil at 165°F (74°C)

ingredients.name: Crisp rice
ingredients.notes: cook in a pan with 1 tsp olive oil at 325°F (165°C)

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add diced onion and cook until translucent.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add 1 cup Syrian rice and 1 cup Basmati rice. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add 2 cups water, 1 tsp salt, 1/2 tsp black pepper, and 1/2 tsp pilaf spice. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes or until the rice is tender and the water is absorbed.
While the rice is cooking, cook the crisp rice in a pan with 1 tsp olive oil at 325°F (165°C) for 5-7 minutes or until crispy.
If using chicken, cook in a pan with 1 tsp olive oil at 165°F (74°C) for 5-7 minutes or until cooked through.
Once the rice is cooked, fluff it with a fork to separate the grains.
To serve, place a portion of the pilaf in a bowl, top with crispy rice, and garnish with diced chicken (if using).
